Comment: inspect latest LINE image manifest and draft

commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && python3 - <<"PY"
import boto3, json

s3 = boto3.client("s3")
bucket = "bkk-election-images-prod"
prefix = "api-data/score/messages/"

keys = []
for page in s3.get_paginator("list_objects_v2").paginate(Bucket=bucket, Prefix=prefix):
    for obj in page.get("Contents", []):
        key = obj["Key"]
        if key.endswith("/manifest.json"):
            keys.append((obj["LastModified"], key))
keys.sort(reverse=True)
print("latest_manifests:")
for ts, key in keys[:8]:
    print(ts.isoformat(), key)
if not keys:
    raise SystemExit("no manifests")

_, latest = keys[0]
manifest = json.loads(s3.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=latest)["Body"].read().decode("utf-8"))
print("\nmanifest:", json.dumps(manifest, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

src = manifest.get("source_message_id")
if not src:
    raise SystemExit(0)

draft_ptr_key = f"api-data/score/messages/{src}/draft_latest.json"
try:
    draft_ptr = json.loads(s3.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=draft_ptr_key)["Body"].read().decode("utf-8"))
    print("\ndraft_latest:", json.dumps(draft_ptr, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    dk = draft_ptr.get("draft_key")
    if dk:
        draft = json.loads(s3.get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=dk)["Body"].read().decode("utf-8"))
        subset = {k: draft.get(k) for k in ["area_id", "report_type", "revision", "validation_flags", "notes", "eligible_voters", "voter_turnout", "valid_ballots", "invalid_ballots", "vote_no", "candidate_scores"]}
        print("\ndraft:", json.dumps(subset, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
        raw = (draft.get("raw_model_output") or {}).get("text")
        if raw:
            print("\nraw_model_output_text:", raw[:3000])
except Exception as exc:
    print("draft_read_error:", exc)
PY'
